description.para: The following constants define various reset lines in the subsystem

briefdescription.para: Reset line going out of vpss.
Reset line for vpss internal video IP blocks.
Reset line for vpss internal AXI-MM blocks.
Mask for all AXIS-connected reset lines in the subsystem.

description.para: The following constants define various Zoom/Pip window horizontal step sizes that keeps the VDMA access aligned to aximm interface width, based on Pixels/Clock and Color Depth of the configured subsystem.

This is required as current version of VDMA does not support DRE if interface width is >64bits. Software has to align the hsize and stride for all possible configurations supported by the subsystem. Current subsystem version supports the following
Number of components = 3 (Fixed)
Pixels/Clock = 1, 2, 4
Color Depth = 8, 10, 12, 16 (4 variations)

briefdescription.para: Pixel horizontal step lookup table indexed by [Pixels/Clock][Color Depth variation].
Driver instance of all sub-cores included in the design.

detaileddescription.para: Subcore repository indexed by device instance

briefdescription.para: This function configures the Video Processing subsystem internal blocks to power on default configuration.

detaileddescription.para:
XVprocSsPtr
is a pointer to the Subsystem instance to be worked on.
*

briefdescription.para: This function queries the subsystem instance configuration to determine the included sub-cores.

detaileddescription.para: For each sub-core that is present in the design the sub-core driver instance is binded with the subsystem sub-core driver handle

XVprocSsPtr
is a pointer to the Subsystem instance to be worked on.
*

briefdescription.para: This function validates the input and output stream configuration against the Subsystem hardware capabilities.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the Subsystem instance to be worked on.

simplesect.para: XST_SUCCESS if successful else XST_FAILURE

briefdescription.para: This function validates the input and output stream configuration for scaler only configuration.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the Subsystem instance to be worked on.

simplesect.para: XST_SUCCESS if successful else XST_FAILURE
This function is applicable only for Stream mode configuration of the subsystem. In this mode only picture resizing is available

briefdescription.para: This function validates the input and output stream configuration for csc only configuration.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the input stream
is a pointer to the output stream

simplesect.para: XST_SUCCESS if successful else XST_FAILURE
This function is applicable only for Stream mode configuration of the subsystem. In this mode very limited functionality is available

briefdescription.para: This function validates the input and output stream configuration for deint only configuration.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the input stream
is a pointer to the output stream

simplesect.para: XST_SUCCESS if successful else XST_FAILURE
This function is applicable only for Stream mode configuration of the subsystem. In this mode very limited functionality is available

briefdescription.para: This function validates the in and out stream configuration for VCResample only configuration.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the input stream
is a pointer to the output stream

simplesect.para: XST_SUCCESS if successful else XST_FAILURE
This function is applicable only for Stream mode configuration of the subsystem. In this mode very limited functionality is available

briefdescription.para: This function validates the input and output stream configuration for the HCResample only configuration.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the input stream
is a pointer to the output stream

simplesect.para: XST_SUCCESS if successful else XST_FAILURE
This function is applicable only for Stream mode configuration of the subsystem. In this mode very limited functionality is available

briefdescription.para: This function configures the video subsystem pipeline for ScalerOnly topology of the subsystem.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the Subsystem instance to be worked on.

simplesect.para: XST_SUCCESS if successful else XST_FAILURE
If use case is possible the subsystem will configure the sub-cores accordingly else will ignore the request

briefdescription.para: This function configures the video subsystem pipeline for CscOnly topology of the subsystem.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the Subsystem instance to be worked on.

simplesect.para: XST_SUCCESS if successful else XST_FAILURE
If use case is possible the subsystem will configure the sub-cores accordingly else will ignore the request

briefdescription.para: This function configures the video subsystem pipeline for DeintOnly topology of the subsystem.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the Subsystem instance to be worked on.

simplesect.para: XST_SUCCESS if successful else XST_FAILURE
If use case is possible the subsystem will configure the sub-cores accordingly else will ignore the request

briefdescription.para: This function configures the video subsystem pipeline for VCResample only topology of the subsystem.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the Subsystem instance to be worked on.

simplesect.para: XST_SUCCESS if successful else XST_FAILURE
If use case is possible the subsystem will configure the sub-cores accordingly else will ignore the request

briefdescription.para: This function configures the video subsystem pipeline for HCResample only topology of the subsystem.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the Subsystem instance to be worked on.

simplesect.para: XST_SUCCESS if successful else XST_FAILURE
If use case is possible the subsystem will configure the sub-cores accordingly else will ignore the request

briefdescription.para: This function configures the video subsystem pipeline for Maximum (Full_Fledged) topology.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the Subsystem instance to be worked on.

simplesect.para: XST_SUCCESS if successful else XST_FAILURE

briefdescription.para: This macro reads the subsystem reset network state.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the Reset IP Block
is number of reset channel to work upon

simplesect.para: Reset state -1: Normal -0: Reset

briefdescription.para: This macro enables the IP's connected to subsystem reset network.

detaileddescription.para:
pReset
is a pointer to the Reset IP Block
channel
is number of reset channel to work upon
ipBlock
is the reset line(s) to be activated
* *
If reset block is not included in the subsystem instance function does not do anything

briefdescription.para: This macro resets the IP connected to subsystem reset network.

detaileddescription.para:
pReset
is a pointer to the Reset IP Block
channel
is number of reset channel to work upon
ipBlock
is the reset line(s) to be asserted
* *
If reset block is not included in the subsystem instance function does not do anything

briefdescription.para: This function routes the delay routine used in the subsystem.

detaileddescription.para: Preference is given to the user registered timer based routine. If no delay handler is registered then it uses the platform specific delay handler

XVprocSsPtr
is a pointer to the subsystem instance
msec
is delay required
*

briefdescription.para: This function registers the user defined delay/sleep function with subsystem.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the Subsystem instance
is the function pointer to the user defined delay function
is the pointer to timer instance used by the delay function

briefdescription.para: This function sets the base address of the video frame buffers used by the subsystem instance.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the Subsystem instance to be worked on.
is the base address of the video frame buffers

briefdescription.para: This function initializes the video subsystem and included sub-cores.

detaileddescription.para: This function must be called prior to using the subsystem. Initialization includes setting up the instance data for top level as well as all included sub-core therein, and ensuring the hardware is in a known stable state.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the Subsystem instance to be worked on.
points to the configuration structure associated with the subsystem instance.
is the base address of the device. If address translation is being used, then this parameter must reflect the virtual base address. Otherwise, the physical address should be used.

simplesect.para: XST_SUCCESS if initialization is successful else XST_FAILURE

briefdescription.para: This function starts the video subsystem including all sub-cores that are included in the processing pipeline for a given use-case.

detaileddescription.para:
Video pipe is started from back to front
InstancePtr
is a pointer to the Subsystem instance to be worked on.
Cores are started only if the corresponding start flag in the scratch pad memory is set. This allows to selectively start only those cores included in the processing chain

briefdescription.para: This function stops the video subsystem including all sub-cores Stop the video pipe starting from front to back.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the Subsystem instance to be worked on.

briefdescription.para: This function resets the video subsystem sub-cores.

detaileddescription.para:
There are 2 reset networks within the subsystem
For cores that are on AXIS interface
For cores that are on AXI-MM interface

briefdescription.para: This function configures the video subsystem input interface.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the Subsystem instance to be worked on.
is the pointer to input stream configuration

simplesect.para: XST_SUCCESS

briefdescription.para: This function configures the video subsystem output interface.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the Subsystem instance to be worked on.
is the pointer to input stream configuration

simplesect.para: XST_SUCCESS

briefdescription.para: This function sets the required subsystem video stream to the user provided stream and timing parameters.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the subsystem video stream to be configured
is the Video Mode ID of the new resolution to be set
is the timing parameters of the new resolution to be set

simplesect.para: XST_SUCCESS if successful else XST_FAILURE

briefdescription.para: This function updates the Pip/Zoom window currently on screen in-place.

detaileddescription.para: This implies the video is not blanked and the new coordinates will update instantly as the function executes

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the Subsystem instance to be worked on.

simplesect.para: This function must be called only after the respective mode (PIP/Zoom) has been enabled and user wants to move window to a new location This function is not applicable in Subsystem Stream Mode Configuration

briefdescription.para: This function allows user to set the Zoom or PIP window.

detaileddescription.para: Scratch pad memory is updated with the new window information

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the Subsystem instance to be worked on.
is feature to be updated PIP or ZOOM
is structure that contains window coordinates and size

simplesect.para: For Zoom mode RD client window is written in scratch pad memory For Pip mode WR client window is written in scratch pad memory This function is not applicable in Subsystem Stream Mode Configuration

briefdescription.para: This function reads the user defined Zoom/Pip window from scratch pad memory.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the Subsystem instance to be worked on.
is feature (PIP or ZOOM) whose window coordinates are to be retrieved
is structure that will contain read window coordinates and size

simplesect.para: For Zoom mode RD client window is read from scratch pad memory For Pip mode WR client window is read from scratch pad memory This function is not applicable in Subsystem Stream Mode Configuration

briefdescription.para: This function configures the video subsystem to enable/disable ZOOM feature If ZOOM mode is set to ON but user has not set window coordinates then quarter of input stream resolution at coordinates 0,0 is set as the default zoom window.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the Subsystem instance to be worked on.
is the action required

simplesect.para: User must call XVprocSs_ConfigureSubsystem() for change to take effect This call has not been added here such that it provides an opportunity to make the change during vertical blanking at system level. This behavior will change once shadow register support is available in sub-core IP's This function is not applicable in Subsystem Stream Mode Configuration

briefdescription.para: This function configures the video subsystem to enable/disable PIP feature If PIP mode is set to ON but user has not set window coordinates then half of input stream resolution at coordinates 0,0 is set as the default zoom window.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the Subsystem instance to be worked on.
is the action required

simplesect.para: User must call XVprocSs_ConfigureSubsystem() for change to take effect This call has not been added here such that it provides an opportunity to make the change during vertical blanking at system level. This behavior will change once shadow register support is available in sub-core IP's This function is not applicable in Subsystem Stream Mode Configuration

briefdescription.para: This function is the entry point into the video processing subsystem driver processing path.

detaileddescription.para: It will examine the instantiated subsystem configuration mode and the input and output stream configuration. Based on the available information control flow is determined and requisite sub-cores are configured to implement the supported use case

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the Subsystem instance to be worked on.

simplesect.para: XST_SUCCESS if successful else XST_FAILURE

briefdescription.para: This function returns picture brighntess setting.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the Subsystem instance to be worked on.

simplesect.para: current value (0-100), if csc subcore is included

briefdescription.para: This function updates picture brighntess setting with specified value.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the Subsystem instance to be worked on.

is the new value to be written
Range: 0-100

simplesect.para: Applicable only if CSC core is included in the subsystem

briefdescription.para: This function returns picture contrast setting.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the Subsystem instance to be worked on.

simplesect.para: current value (0-100), if csc subcore is included

briefdescription.para: This function updates picture contrast setting with specified value.

detaileddescription.para:
InstancePtr
is a pointer to the Subsystem instance to be worked on.
NewValue
is the new value to be written
Range: 0-100
* *
Applicable only if CSC core is included in the subsystem

briefdescription.para: This function returns picture saturation setting.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the Subsystem instance to be worked on.

simplesect.para: current value (0-100), if csc subcore is included

briefdescription.para: This function updates picture saturation setting with specified value.

detaileddescription.para:
InstancePtr
is a pointer to the Subsystem instance to be worked on.
NewValue
is the new value to be written
Range: 0-100
* *
Applicable only if CSC core is included in the subsystem

briefdescription.para: This function returns picture gain setting for the specified color channel.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the Subsystem instance to be worked on.
is the color channel id for which gain is requested

simplesect.para: current value (0-100), if csc subcore is included

briefdescription.para: This function updates picture gain setting with specified value.

detaileddescription.para:
InstancePtr
is a pointer to the Subsystem instance to be worked on.
ChId
is the color channel id for which gain is to be updated
NewValue
is the new value to be written
Range: 0-100
* *
Applicable only if CSC core is included in the subsystem

briefdescription.para: This function returns picture color standard setting for input.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the Subsystem instance to be worked on.

simplesect.para:
Current set color standard, if csc core is included
XVIDC_BT_2020
XVIDC_BT_709
XVIDC_BT_601 Else XVIDC_BT_UNKNOWN

briefdescription.para: This function returns picture color standard setting for output.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the Subsystem instance to be worked on.

simplesect.para:
Current set color standard, if csc core is included
XVIDC_BT_2020
XVIDC_BT_709
XVIDC_BT_601 Else XVIDC_BT_UNKNOWN

briefdescription.para: This function sets picture color standard setting for input.

detaileddescription.para:
InstancePtr
is a pointer to the Subsystem instance to be worked on.
NewVal
is the required color standard
XVIDC_BT_2020
XVIDC_BT_709
XVIDC_BT_601
* *
Applicable only if CSC core is included in the subsystem

briefdescription.para: This function sets picture color standard setting for output.

detaileddescription.para:
InstancePtr
is a pointer to the Subsystem instance to be worked on.
NewVal
is the required color standard
XVIDC_BT_2020
XVIDC_BT_709
XVIDC_BT_601
* *
Applicable only if CSC core is included in the subsystem

briefdescription.para: This function returns picture color range for output.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the Subsystem instance to be worked on.

simplesect.para:
Current set output range, if csc core is included
XVIDC_CR_16_235
XVIDC_CR_16_240

briefdescription.para: This function sets picture color range for output.

detaileddescription.para:
InstancePtr
is a pointer to the Subsystem instance to be worked on.
NewVal
is the required color range
XVIDC_CR_16_235
XVIDC_CR_16_240
XVIDC_CR_0_255
* *
Applicable only if CSC core is included in the subsystem

briefdescription.para: This function sets picture Demo Window.

detaileddescription.para: Post this function call all further picture settings will apply only within the defined window. Demo window gets reset every time subsystem configuration changes

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the Subsystem instance to be worked on.
is the pointer to window coordinates within which picture settings should be applied

simplesect.para: XST_SUCCESS if window is valid else XST_FAILURE
Applicable only if CSC core is included in the subsystem and the Demo Window is enabled

briefdescription.para: This function sets PIP background color.

detaileddescription.para:
InstancePtr
is a pointer to the Subsystem instance to be worked on.
ColorId
is the requested background color
XLBOX_BKGND_BLACK
XLBOX_BKGND_WHITE
XLBOX_BKGND_RED
XLBOX_BKGND_GREEN
XLBOX_BKGND_BLUE
* *
Applicable only if Letterbox core is included in the subsystem

memberdef.argsstring: (XVprocSs *InstancePtr, u32 CoreId, u16 num_phases, u16 num_taps, const short *Coeff)
memberdef.name: XVprocSs_LoadScalerCoeff

briefdescription.para: This function enables user to load external filter coefficients for Scaler cores, independently for H & V.

detaileddescription.para:
InstancePtr
is a pointer to the Subsystem instance to be worked on.
CoreId
is the Scaler core to be worked on
XVPROCSS_SUBCORE_SCALER_V
XVPROCSS_SUBCORE_SCALER_H
num_phases
is the number of phases supported by Scaler
num_taps
is the effective taps to be used by Scaler
Coeff
is the pointer to the filter table to be loaded
* *
Applicable only if Scaler cores are included in the subsystem

memberdef.argsstring: (XVprocSs *InstancePtr, u32 CoreId, u16 num_taps, const short *Coeff)
memberdef.name: XVprocSs_LoadChromaResamplerCoeff

briefdescription.para: This function enables user to load external filter coefficients for Chroma Resampler cores, independently for H & V.

detaileddescription.para:
InstancePtr
is a pointer to the Subsystem instance to be worked on.
CoreId
is the resampler core to be worked on
XVPROCSS_SUBCORE_CR_H
XVPROCSS_SUBCORE_CR_V_IN
XVPROCSS_SUBCORE_CR_V_OUT
num_taps
is the taps of the resampler hw instance
Coeff
is the pointer to the filter table to be loaded
* *
Applicable only if Resampler cores are included in the subsystem

briefdescription.para: This function reports the status of specified sub-core.

detaileddescription.para:
InstancePtr
is a pointer to the Subsystem instance to be worked on.
SubcoreId
is the subcore index from the below list
XVPROCSS_SUBCORE_SCALER_V
XVPROCSS_SUBCORE_SCALER_H
XVPROCSS_SUBCORE_VDMA
XVPROCSS_SUBCORE_LBOX
XVPROCSS_SUBCORE_CR_H
XVPROCSS_SUBCORE_CR_V_IN
XVPROCSS_SUBCORE_CR_V_OUT
XVPROCSS_SUBCORE_CSC
XVPROCSS_SUBCORE_DEINT
*

briefdescription.para: This function reports Video Processing Subsystem HW configuration.

detaileddescription.para:
InstancePtr
is a pointer to the Subsystem instance.
*

briefdescription.para: This function reports the subsystem HW and input/output stream configuration.

detaileddescription.para:
InstancePtr
is a pointer to the Subsystem instance to be worked on.
*
